global.title: Chinese PV Industry Brief: Sungrow storage overtakes inverters in 2025
global.summary: Sungrow says energy storage systems overtook PV inverters as its largest business segment in 2025, as the company posted double-digit revenue and profit growth.

global.title: TCL Zhonghuan to acquire control of DAS Solar in consolidation move
global.summary: TCL Zhonghuan has agreed to take majority control of Chinese solar manufacturer DAS Solar, a producer of advanced n-type modules based on tunnel oxide passivated contact (TOPCon) and back-contact (BC) technologies.

global.title: Malaysia’s solar capacity surpasses 5.7 GW
global.summary: Reports from the International Energy Agency's Photovoltaic Power Systems Programme (IEA-PVPS) indicate Malaysia added over 1.4 GW of solar in 2025, with more than 5.7 GW now deployed across multiple government schemes.

global.title: Hydro-Québec launches grant for residential, commercial solar
global.summary: Hydro-Québec has introduced a grant offering up to CAD 1,000 ($718.40) per kilowatt installed, covering up to 40% of eligible costs to accelerate rooftop solar adoption and reduce payback periods for residential and business customers in the Canadian province of Québec.

global.title: Heat dome and high pressure boost southern US solar as polar vortex clouds the north
global.summary: In a new weekly update for pv magazine, Solcast, a DNV company, reports that last month North America saw a stark solar divide, with southern regions like northeastern Mexico, southeastern Texas, and much of California experiencing 20–25% above-average irradiance, while Canada, the Great Lakes, and

global.title: Agratas advances 20 GWh battery plant in western India
global.summary: Agratas, the global battery business of the Tata Group, has completed the steel frame of its Sanand facility in India, with production expected to begin in 2027.

global.title: Zambia tenders 300 MW of solar
global.summary: The first bid window of Zambia's new Carbon Feed In Premium Program plans to develop 300 MW of solar across projects that are connected to on-site battery energy storage systems. The deadline to submit expressions of interest is May 31.

global.title: Rooftop solar now accounts for one-fifth of Puerto Rico’s generation capacity
global.summary: Distributed solar additions have vastly outpaced all other forms of generation as Puerto Rico’s overall power generation capacity continues to grow.

global.title: Terabase Energy advances automated PV construction with robotics, AI tools
global.summary: California-based Terabase Energy is scaling up its automated solar construction platform and expanding its engineering software ecosystem to improve project delivery and performance modeling.

global.title: ‘Motherhood further shaped my leadership perspective’
global.summary: This week Women in Solar+ Europe gives voice to Margarita Licht, Product Manager BESS & Charging at Germany's Goldbeck Solar. She says diverse perspectives and cognitive styles are essential in the solar and energy storage sector, enabling smarter solutions, effective problem-solving, and long-t

global.title: Top Selling Electric Vehicles in the World — February 2026
global.summary: Plugin vehicle registrations were down 11% year over year (YoY) in February, ending the month close to 1.1 million units. Both BEVs (-8% YoY) and PHEVs (-16% YoY) had sales drops. This is the worst drop since the COVID-19 era, but there is one easy explanation for this — incentives. ... [continued]

global.title: EVs Sweep 2026 World Car Awards
global.summary: On Wednesday, April 1, the 22nd World Car Awards announced the winners for 2026. EVs swept every category. Every year, a panel of journalists from around the world votes on finalists and winners in each category. While the test drives happen in California in the fall, the vehicles come from around .

global.title: BEVs Rise 16% YoY in February in Europe!
global.summary: BEVs reach 20% market share! EVs are picking up in Europe, with some 295,000 plugin vehicles being registered in Europe in February, 196,000 of them being BEVs. Overall, plugin vehicles were up 22% YoY. The overall market also had a positive month in February, rising 2% YoY to one million ... [conti

global.title: Google, AI, & Carbon Emissions — A Lesson In Situational Ethics
global.summary: Google styles itself as a leader in the use of renewable energy, but it is backsliding on that commitment because of AI. The post Google, AI, & Carbon Emissions — A Lesson In Situational Ethics appeared first on CleanTechnica.

global.title: Balcony Solar Is Here, And It’s Not Just For Balconies
global.summary: Balcony solar kits can be placed anywhere sun is available, feeding clean electricity directly into household wiring while reducing monthly utility bills. The post Balcony Solar Is Here, And It’s Not Just For Balconies appeared first on CleanTechnica.
